textByHash.33e6712fd53e3eb6f5e9ff55e470ce6d0e4a851d: Me? I am the Archpriest who was responsible for the running of this place! I am impressed that you managed to reach my resting place on the lowest level.
textByHash.640ca73342e9a9215e72ed9cbe123bc665960991: The intention was that they should've been impossible to pass. I should know. After all, it was I who was responsible for overseeing the safeguarding of this place.
textByHash.a81430f2c5388127e4058c18f8f9d258cb6b23de: I'm not sure if I should say... I wouldn't want to compromise the trust that the Justiciar of the Unicorn has in me. Afterall, we did what we did for the safety of Hallowvale.
textByHash.4fbda0916ea1dcc72f06d05081de8911e1044922: I see... So we lost then? In that case, I suppose it doesn't hurt to tell you after all.
textByHash.045508dbf7200ea6377bee56dde3b460f9cad932: One day the justiciar sent word to me that I should begin work on securing the Sepulchre. He feared an invasion from the followers of the Dark Lord.
textByHash.7c1428531793d50120e51f746193eba7b960984e: Yes, I do. The justiciar said he was going to confront these forces but that I should stay to protect the secrets within this place. I wish I could have joined him on the battlefield. I carried out my duties though.
textByHash.20bb19fca80ec9dda298fdb8bb733326997ca734: I never told the others what was really happening. Day by day we worked our way down to the final floor.
textByHash.c1979546b53ddc04a6b3c622e14ce34484b1054c: As we progressed further, we became more experienced at creating the traps. Each one was more deadly than the last.
textByHash.7ec62f6664c56d8ea3d9c4f0c0e03912a746e1a6: Eventually, when our work was done, I performed the last rites for each of my followers and sealed them within the coffins on the final floor.
textByHash.92a0f1d3a962f230233cbd84ac12362ce4f113db: Finally, I did the same for myself. The knowledge of how to disarm the traps died with us.
textByHash.944b8b4a6e9c5dd052d390fb8e1dc0e0c12bf6c9: No, I think at that point most of us were already dead. We died knowing that we sacrificed ourselves for the good of holy Saradomin and the justiciars who follow him.
textByHash.771d5af3f37987d7d3ff209a50613d81274285dc: I am glad adventurer. Perhaps that information will allow my spirit to pass on peacefully soon.
textByHash.0dea43fb0ee7a0239034338c40691470fdd92714: What are you doing in my coffin? Leave this holy place at once!
textByHash.84f0a798db72cb233e70a9dff505cbaa67ca3477: That... That's my ring! I thought I destroyed it!
textByHash.c95c6c700a7c0ee52932d40c126721713d233ee4: The Justiciar of the Unicorn bestowed it upon me to help with my work within this place.
textByHash.b5d19fac5adbb53d8f5e24cd5d123a6d19788b63: I had to work for many hours each day to ensure that everything ran smoothly. As I got older, I found it more and more difficult.
textByHash.7cc7473b0dfd6ad84e4028f39b753063889b0950: This ring allowed me to continue my work without feeling the effects that aging was having on my body. I suppose I have no use for it now. I guess you can keep it.
textByHash.482d83f9d1a48e2cb0e94ab9003ff4f37491f54c: When I got word that we had to protect this place from the Zamorakian invaders, I was worried that the ring would fall into the wrong hands.
textByHash.388b455e2de13d64be54fdb7fb30d639fcc9b1a8: You don't seem to be too bad though. I hope you put the ring to good use!
